title: Communauté de communes du Pays Neufchâtelois
summary: The Communauté de communes du Pays Neufchâtelois  is a former intercommunality in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of north-western France. It was created on 1 January 1998. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Bray-Eawy in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Pays Neufchâtelois  is a former intercommunality in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of north-western France. It was created on 1 January 1998. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Bray-Eawy in January 2017.

Participants
The Communauté de communes comprised the following 23 communes:
